description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large, grid-style windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house is surrounded by lush, mature trees with dense green foliage and purple blossoms, providing a natural, shaded environment. The interior appears open and airy, with visible rooms and a clear separation between living spaces. The main entryway is simple, with a flat facade and no visible porch or decorative columns. The overall aesthetic is clean, functional, and contemporary, blending urban living with natural landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story white house with large grid windows and a flat roof, surrounded by leafy trees with purple blossoms.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with large grid windows and a clear view of the interior, as well as a dense cluster of trees behind it.
description_view_1: The back of the house is visible, mostly obscured by trees, with minimal window openings and a solid white wall.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the rear and side of the house, with the trees dominating the view and only a small portion of the house visible.
description_view_3: The front facade is shown, featuring the main entryway, large windows, and a clean, flat exterior with trees to the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flat entry with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade
